evidence: Over the years I've developed an intuition for how much I can help someone and more importantly how much help is even worth offering because sometimes it just ends up being more.

Building a voice engine that analyzes V's LinkedIn posts and comments. Goal: Generate AI drafts that pass Pangram (AI detection tool). Challenge: Even with voice analysis, content still triggers AI detection.
Possessed by whatever is the vibe coding equivalent of the holy spirit. Working 7:58 PM to ~7:00 AM building complete products in single prompts.
Anthropic closed Claude Code access to third-party platforms, affecting Zo. V paid $100 for max plan just before the access was revoked. Pulled the rug from under my feet.
Release 3 podcast episodes as a batch rather than weekly drops. Weekly drops suggest ongoing series commitment. Batch release creates 'splash' and more eyeballs.
Built an interview feedback tool using Zo's new Stripe integration in a single prompt. Accepts JD and interview transcript, generates structured feedback with grades, produces final assessment.
Tracking 'worldview positions' - V's stances on various topics. Downloaded LinkedIn data, converted to DuckDB database. Can query for top performing posts within minutes using Zo.
